diagnostic_interpretation.fact: The revised local-context rule writes no terminal commits and the route diagnostic joins labels only after action rows are written.
diagnostic_interpretation.agent_inference: The safe-but-inert result is not only excessive strictness. The source-pool proxy can pass no-valid pools, and own-view detector/SAM2 category evidence can show object visibility without establishing ObjectNav goal validity.
diagnostic_interpretation.paper_constraint: The next method must be framed as route-specific active evidence acquisition. It must not be framed as detector-score reranking, source-top reranking, or threshold tuning from joined labels.

allowed_action_inputs: non-GT semantic scores and uncertainty scores
candidate support, reachability, and grounded_position fields
local-context plan roles and viewpoint metadata
detector box, SAM2 mask, projection, depth, and candidate-association evidence
own-view, cross-view, and rival support counts

source_pool_repair_v1.purpose: Separate candidate-pool validity from repeated-instance goal validity before any terminal decision.
source_pool_repair_v1.trigger: The current source-pool validity evidence is missing, contradicted, or insufficient to establish that the action-time candidate pool contains a plausible ObjectNav goal candidate.
required_evidence_to_exit_branch: candidate pool completeness or expansion evidence from a non-GT backend
at least one reachable candidate with independent support beyond source score-shape
explicit report of unresolved or repaired source-pool validity
blocked_shortcuts: treat high source score as valid pool proof
treat detector-visible category instance as valid pool proof
force a choice among candidates when pool validity is unresolved

goal_validity_confirmation_v1.purpose: Test whether a visible same-category candidate is the valid ObjectNav goal instance after source-pool validity is not rejected.
goal_validity_confirmation_v1.trigger: The pool is not rejected, but local-context evidence leaves detector-strong, source-top, or multiple strong own-view candidates unresolved.
required_evidence_to_exit_branch: candidate-specific confirmation that is stronger than object/category visibility
rival suppression or contradiction evidence for same-category distractors
cross-view leakage check so visibility from another candidate view is not treated as identity proof
spatial consistency between source memory, local observation, and candidate grounded position

instance_arbitration_defer_v1.purpose: Keep unresolved repeated-instance ambiguity out of terminal commits.
instance_arbitration_defer_v1.trigger: Multiple strong candidates remain compatible with the evidence or no candidate-specific confirmation is available.

expected_next_analyzer.name: expanded_retrieval_local_context_route_specific_v1
expected_next_analyzer.role: route rows to source-pool repair, goal-validity confirmation evidence, or defer; do not issue paper-facing terminal commits
expected_next_analyzer.input_scope: the same frozen paper-scale local-context rows used by the route diagnostic

promotion_rules.route_contract_only: Passing this contract allows branch-specific planner/evidence implementation, not a paper utility claim.
promotion_rules.branch_validation_needed: A paper-facing terminal rule requires a fresh or predeclared branch validation after source-pool repair and goal-validity confirmation evidence are fixed.
promotion_rules.safe_but_inert: Zero wrong/no-valid commits with zero success remains safety evidence only.
promotion_rules.unsafe_nonzero: Any wrong/no-valid terminal commit blocks policy-scale comparison and requires failure diagnosis.

next_steps: Implement a route-specific analyzer from this contract.
Run Docker py_compile or equivalent smoke check.
Run the analyzer on the frozen paper-scale local-context rows.
Keep terminal commit and policy-scale comparison blocked until branch-specific evidence is validated.
